name: Maqaa

stationDetails.paymentDetailsHint: These details update automatically for the station you selected, so customers do not need to remember them.
stationDetails.paymentCopyHint: Tap Copy for the phone or account number, then paste it into your payment app.
stationDetails.paymentDetailsMissing: This station has not added manual payment details yet. You can still use the in-app checkout button.
stationDetails.copyFailedBody: We could not copy that value. Please copy it manually.
stationDetails.checkInDesc: Buufata irratti cheekii-in jalqabi, itti aansuun OTP/QR hojjetaa agarsiisi.
stationDetails.noReports: Buufata kanaaf gabaasni yeroo ammaa hin jiru.
stationDetails.noReviews: Buufata kanaaf yaadni yeroo ammaa hin jiru.
stationDetails.invalidLitersBody: Lakkoofsa liitiraa sirrii kan 0 caalu galchi.
stationDetails.noTicketBody: Tikkeen hojii irra jiru hin argamne.
stationDetails.stationIdMissingBody: Buufatni kun stationId backend sirrii hin qabu.
stationDetails.checkInMissingTicketBody: Cheekii-in dura tikkee hiriiraa hojii irra jiru qabaachuu qabda.
stationDetails.locationRequiredBody: Cheekii-in jalqabuuf hayyama bakka banuu qaba.
stationDetails.waitingPaymentConfirm: Mirkaneessa kaffaltii eegaa jira. Haala Kaffaltii Ilaali cuqaasi.
stationDetails.paymentVerified: Kaffaltiin mirkanaa'eera. Tikkeen kee amma hojii irra jira.
stationDetails.noActiveTicket: Tikkeen hojii irra jiru hin jiru.
stationDetails.completePaymentFirst: QR yookaan OTP check-in uumuuf dura kaffaltii milkaa'aa xumuri.
stationDetails.startForQr: QR fi OTP uumuuf cheekii-in jalqabi.
stationDetails.attendantNote: Mirkaneessi hojjetaa appii hojjetaa keessatti qofa taasifama.
stationDetails.objectIdError: Buufatni kun backend ObjectId sirrii hin qabu. Queue dura odeeffannoo buufataa haaromsi.
stationDetails.noFuelBody: Buufatni kun duwwaa ta'ee mallatteeffameera. Buufata biraa yaali.
stationDetails.limitedFuelBody: Buufatni kun boba'aa daangeffame qaba. Kaffaltii itti fufuu barbaaddaa?
stationDetails.queueSavedOffline: Gaaffiin hiriiraa offline keessatti kuufameera. Yeroo qunnamtiin deebi'u walqabsiifama. Kaffaltiin garuu intarneeta barbaada.
stationDetails.leaveSavedOffline: Gaaffiin hiriiraa keessaa ba'uu offline keessatti kuufameera. Yeroo qunnamtiin deebi'u walqabsiifama.
stationDetails.leaveDisabledNotice: Buufata boba'aan jiru irratti kaffaltii booda hiriiraa keessaa ba'uun ni cufama.

darkModeSubtitle: Iftoomina gadi aanaa irratti ifa hir'isi
unitsSubtitle: Fageenyaa fi baay'ina akkamitti akka mul'atu filadhu
preferredFuelSubtitle: Buufata fi beeksisa siif mijataa godhi
clearCacheConfirm: Kun daataa kuufame ni haqa, filannoowwanis meeshaa kana irratti deebisa.
deleteAccountConfirm: Tarkaanfiin kun hin deebi'u. Akaawuntiin ni haqama.

login.title: Baga Nagaan Dhuftan
login.subtitle: FuelFinder itti fufuuf seenaa
login.requiredError: Imeelii yookaan lakkoofsa gabatee fi jecha darbii galchi.

register.title: Akkaawuntii Uumi
register.subtitle: FuelFinder fayyadamuuf galmaa'i
register.passwordHint: Jecha darbii: qubee 8+ fi qubee gurguddaa/xixiqqaa, lakkoofsa fi mallattoo addaa qabaachuu qaba.
register.requiredError: Maqaa, imeelii, bilbila, gosa gabatee, lakkoofsa gabatee fi jechi darbii dirqama.

homeScreen.subtitle: Buufataalee kallattiin, haala hiriiraa fi filannoo si dhihoo jiru

promotions.title: Station promotions
promotions.subtitle: Published by admins and shown only when live offers are available nearby.

location.denied: Hayyamni bakka hin kennamne. Buufata qofa agarsiisaa jira.
location.fail: Bakka amma jirtu argachuun hin danda'amne.

stations.loadFail: Buufataalee dhugaa dhihoo jiru fe'uun hin danda'amne.

route.label: Daandii
route.needLocation: Daandii agarsiisuuf bakka amma jirtu barbaachisa.
route.unavailable: Daandiin kallattii amma hin argamu. Irra deebi'i yaali.

homeScreen.fastLineReason: Hiriirri saffisaa fi boba'aan ni tasgabbaa'a
homeScreen.limitedReason: Boba'aan muraasa; saffisaan deemi yoo barbaachise
homeScreen.highDemandReason: Gaaffiin guddaadha; yeroo dheeraa eeguu dandeessa
homeScreen.noMatch: Buufanni calallii kee wajjin hin walsimu.
